description:
This is a component that allows you to locally change a reference on a value. Changing the value locally for yourself or others so that an item or world element is different depending on who's viewing it.
}}

fields.Target: The value to drive locally for every user
fields.Default: The content of this value will be inside of ``Target`` for every user locally unless otherwise specified by an Override inside of the ``_overrides`` bag.
fields.CreateOverrideOnWrite: When flux or any other means tries to set the value of target from someone's machine, create an Override for them in ``_overrides`` bag.
fields.PersistentOverrides: whether to save the overrides or not when the component is part of a hierarchy being saved. This is useful to turn on when an item should have overrides
fields._overrides: A bag of Overrides that are read to make local changes to the value referenced by ``Target``
